MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIKRAM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-26-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-02-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEPT 8 JUDGE MARTIN SUITS C/C FOR S/C. ALL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED. TERMS STATED ON THE RECORD. PLTF PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUTSON, SARAH CARKHUM, COLLIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 936 MISSION ST, #238, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE BY 5:00 PM 2-15-94, PLTF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $1,260.00 RENT; DAMAGES OF $14.00 PER DAY FROM 1-3-94 THROUGHT 2-15-94, AND COSTS OF $80.00 FOR A TOTAL OF $1,876.00. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AT THE PREMISES AFTER 2-15-94 IS DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
